title: UnicornStudio Library Initialization Snippet
description: Embeds and initializes UnicornStudio v1.4.30 via a full-screen, behind-content div. Automatically loads the external UMD script and runs UnicornStudio.init() on page load. Suitable for adding UnicornStudio analytics or widgets to any webpage.
code: <div data-us-project="HrR4RrsSf8RcKjStWKwR" class="absolute w-full h-full left-0 top-0 -z-10"><script type="text/javascript">!function(){if(!window.UnicornStudio){window.UnicornStudio={isInitialized:!1};var i=document.createElement("script");i.src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/hiunicornstudio/unicornstudio.js@v1.4.30/dist/unicornStudio.umd.js",i.onload=function(){window.UnicornStudio.isInitialized||(UnicornStudio.init(),window.UnicornStudio.isInitialized=!0)},(document.head || document.body).appendChild(i)}}();</script>
